name: office-ppt
description: Native .pptx generation + reading via pptxgenjs/jszip — replaces HTML .ppt fallback

tianshu.name: office-ppt
tianshu.description: Native .pptx generation (themes, charts, speaker notes) + .pptx text extraction — title slides, content slides, text + image layouts

tools.name: pptx_create
tools.description: Generate a real .pptx file from slide definitions (theme, chart, speaker notes)

tools.name: pptx_read
tools.description: Extract slide text (+ optional speaker notes) from a .pptx as markdown
